name: FLERP
short_description: Fend off hordes of enemies in this arcade tower defense roguelite with autobattler elements. Build up a team of powerful synergies and become unstoppable.
detailed_description:
FLERP is an arcade tower defense roguelite where you defend your core from massive hordes of enemies. Recruit units from the shop and build up a team of powerful synergies to completely dominate the opposition.

Gameplay

  • Recruit units from the shop
  • Your units will automatically attack nearby enemies
  • Gain gold and interest with every level, which can be spent in the shop
  • Find powerful items to enhance your builds even further

Features

  • 40+ units to recruit
  • 40+ items to find
  • 14 classes with their own synergies
